title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, EaseMyTrip in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
